title: The Supplication for Sunday
fullText:
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

In the Name of ALLAH, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

بِسْمِ اللهِ الَّذِي

In the name of ALLAH,

لاَ أَرْجُو إِلاَّ فَضْلَهُ،

from whom I hope for nothing but bounty,

وَلاَ أَخْشَى إلاَّ عَدْلَهُ،

and from whom I fear nothing but justice

وَلا أَعْتَمِدُ إلاَّ قَوْلَهُ،

I rely only upon His word,

وَلا أَتَمَسَّكُ [اُمْسِكُ خ ل ]إلاَّ بِحَبْلِهِ.

and I cling only to His cord

بِكَ أَسْتَجِيرُ

In Thee I seek sanctuary

يا ذَا الْعَفْوِ وَالرِّضْوانِ

—O Possessor of pardon and good pleasure—

مِنَ الظُّلْمِ وَالْعُدْوانِ،

from wrong and enmity,

وَمِنْ غِيَرِ الزَّمانِ،

from the changes of time

وَتَواتُرِ الاَحْزانِ،

and the recurrence of sorrows,

[وَمِنْ طَوارِقِ الْحَدَثَانِ]

and from the striking of mishaps

وَمِنِ انْقِضآءِ الْمُدَّةِ قَبْلَ التَّأَهُّبِ وَالْعُدَّةِ.

from the expiration of my term before preparation and readiness.

وَإيَّاكَ أَسْتَرْشِدُ لِما فِيهِ الصَّلاحُ وَالاِصْلاحُ،

From Thee I seek guidance to that wherein is righteousness and being set right.

وَبِكَ أَسْتَعِينُ فِيما يَقْتَرِنُ بِهِ النَّجاحُ وَالاِنْجاحُ.

From Thee I seek help in that which is linked to success and favorable response.

وَإيَّاكَ أَرْغَبُ فِي لِباسِ الْعافِيَةِ وَتَمامِها، وَشُمُولِ السَّلامَةِ وَدَوامِها،

Thee I beseech for the garment of well-being and its completion and for the covering of health and its permanence.

وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ يارَبِّ مِنْ هَمَزاتِ الشَّياطِينِ،

I seek refuge in Thee, my Lord, from the goadings of the SATANs,

وَأَحْتَرِزُ بِسُلْطانِكَ مِنْ جَوْرِ السَّلاطِينِ،

and I seek protection in Thy sovereignty from the injustice of the sovereigns.

فَتَقَبَّلْ ما كانَ مِنْ صَلاتِي وَصَوْمِي،

So accept my past prayers and fasting

واجْعَلْ غدي وَمَا بَعْدَهُ أفَضَلَ من سَاعَتي وَيَوْمِي،

and make my tomorrow and what is after better than my present hour and my today!

وَأَعِزَّنِي فِي عَشِيرَتِي وَقَوْمِي،

Exalt me in my clan and my people

وَاحْفَظْنِي فِي يَقْظَتِي وَنَوْمِي،

and protect me in my waking and my sleeping!

فَأَنْتَ اللَّهُ خَيْرٌ حافِظاً،

For Thou art ALLAH, the Best Guardian,

وَأَنْتَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ.

and Thou art the Most Merciful of the merciful.

أَللَّهُمَّ إنِّي أَبْرَأُ إلَيْكَ

O ALLAH, I am quit before Thee

فِي يَوْمِي هذا وَ في ما بَعْدَهُ مِنَ الاحادِ مِنَ الشِّرْكَ وَالالْحَادِ،

on this day of mine and on all Sundays that follow it of associating others with Thee and of heresy

وَأُخْلِصُ لَكَ دُعآئِي تَعَرُّضَاً لِلاِجابَةِ

I devote my supplication sincerely to Thee, addressing myself to Thy response.

فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِ مُحَمَّد

So bless MUHAMMAD and the Household of MUHAMMAD,

خَيْرِ خَلْقِكَ، الدَّاعِي إلَى حَقِّكَ،

the best of Thy creation, the summoner to Thy truth,

وَأَعِزَّنِي بِعِزِّكَ الَّذِي لا يُضامُ،

exalt me with Thy exaltation, which is never made to suffer loss,

وَاحْفَظْنِي بِعَيْنِك الَّتِي لاتَنامُ،

protect me with Thy eye, which never sleeps,

وَاخْتِمْ بِالانْقِطَاعِ إلَيْكَ أَمْرِي، وَبِالْمَغْفِرَةِ عُمْرِي،

and seal my affair by cutting me off from everything but Thee and my life with forgiveness!

إنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْغَفُورُ الرَّحِيمُ.

Surely Thou art the All-forgiving, the All-compassionate!

translations.text: In the Name of ALLAH, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate
In the name of ALLAH,
from whom I hope for nothing but bounty,
and from whom I fear nothing but justice
I rely only upon His word,
and I cling only to His cord
In Thee I seek sanctuary
—O Possessor of pardon and good pleasure—
from wrong and enmity,
from the changes of time
and the recurrence of sorrows,
and from the striking of mishaps

pairs.arabic: وَمِنِ انْقِضآءِ الْمُدَّةِ قَبْلَ التَّأَهُّبِ وَالْعُدَّةِ.

translations.text: from the expiration of my term before preparation and readiness.

pairs.arabic: وَإيَّاكَ أَسْتَرْشِدُ لِما فِيهِ الصَّلاحُ وَالاِصْلاحُ،

translations.text: From Thee I seek guidance to that wherein is righteousness and being set right.

pairs.arabic: وَبِكَ أَسْتَعِينُ فِيما يَقْتَرِنُ بِهِ النَّجاحُ وَالاِنْجاحُ.

translations.text: From Thee I seek help in that which is linked to success and favorable response.

pairs.arabic: وَإيَّاكَ أَرْغَبُ فِي لِباسِ الْعافِيَةِ وَتَمامِها، وَشُمُولِ السَّلامَةِ وَدَوامِها،

translations.text: Thee I beseech for the garment of well-being and its completion and for the covering of health and its permanence.

pairs.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ يارَبِّ مِنْ هَمَزاتِ الشَّياطِينِ،

translations.text: I seek refuge in Thee, my Lord, from the goadings of the SATANs,
and I seek protection in Thy sovereignty from the injustice of the sovereigns.

pairs.arabic: فَتَقَبَّلْ ما كانَ مِنْ صَلاتِي وَصَوْمِي،

translations.text: So accept my past prayers and fasting

pairs.arabic: واجْعَلْ غدي وَمَا بَعْدَهُ أفَضَلَ من سَاعَتي وَيَوْمِي،

translations.text: and make my tomorrow and what is after better than my present hour and my today!
Exalt me in my clan and my people
and protect me in my waking and my sleeping!
For Thou art ALLAH, the Best Guardian,
and Thou art the Most Merciful of the merciful.
O ALLAH, I am quit before Thee

pairs.arabic: فِي يَوْمِي هذا وَ في ما بَعْدَهُ مِنَ الاحادِ مِنَ الشِّرْكَ وَالالْحَادِ،

translations.text: on this day of mine and on all Sundays that follow it of associating others with Thee and of heresy
I devote my supplication sincerely to Thee, addressing myself to Thy response.
So bless MUHAMMAD and the Household of MUHAMMAD,
the best of Thy creation, the summoner to Thy truth,
exalt me with Thy exaltation, which is never made to suffer loss,
protect me with Thy eye, which never sleeps,

pairs.arabic: وَاخْتِمْ بِالانْقِطَاعِ إلَيْكَ أَمْرِي، وَبِالْمَغْفِرَةِ عُمْرِي،

translations.text: and seal my affair by cutting me off from everything but Thee and my life with forgiveness!
Surely Thou art the All-forgiving, the All-compassionate!
